feed.title: Lee, Chien-Pang
feed.subtitle: Free style blogging about my day to day technical problem-solving tasks.

entry.title: I don't have a say
entry.summary: Why bother hussling with blogging on GitHub and put myself in a state where I have to constently struggle with writing and editing? Even at this moment this recurring question lingers in my head. All in all, it’s a combination of multiple factors, numerous instances and mental journeys that happened over the past years; all leading to one question. How do I better controll my own work? To be mo...
